title: Virundeeswarar Temple
tagline: Virundeeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thiruthudisaimpathy Virundeeswarar Temple ([விருந்தீஸ்வரர்) is located in Vadamadurai near Thudiyalur on Mettupalayam road in the State of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Thiruthudisaimpathy Virundeeswarar Temple ([விருந்தீஸ்வரர்) is located in Vadamadurai near Thudiyalur on Mettupalayam road in the State of Tamil Nadu. Earlier it was called Thiruthudisaimpathy, and later Thudiyalur. It is an ancient temple, more than 1300+ years old. It is one of the most important Siva Temples in Coimbatore.

topPlaces.name: Thudiyalur
topPlaces.description: Thudiyalur is a neighborhood of Coimbatore in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located in the western part of the state, it is part of Coimbatore North taluk in Coimbatore district.

topPlaces.description: Appanaickenpalayam is a neighbourhood in Coimbatore district of Tamil Nadu state in India.

topPlaces.name: Ashokapuram, Coimbatore
topPlaces.description: Ashokapuram is a part of the city of Coimbatore in the state of Tamil Nadu, India, located 12 km north of the city center. Ashokapuram is located on a stretch of the Mettupalayam road in Coimbatore.

topPlaces.description: Goundampalayam is a suburb and former municipality in Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is part of the Coimbatore Corporation, located in the north-western part of the state.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Virundeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Virundeeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Virundeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (13 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (9 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Virundeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Virundeeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Virundeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Virundeeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Virundeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thudiyalur, Appanaickenpalayam, Ashokapuram, Coimbatore, Vellakinar, Kurudampalayam.
